scripts.build: npm run build:web && npm run build:api
scripts.test:db:prepare: cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://veridia:veridia@127.0.0.1:5432/initiare_erp?schema=public JWT_SECRET=change-this-jwt-secret-before-production-123456 ACTIVE_ACTIONS_HMAC_SECRET=change-this-active-actions-secret-min-32 MAILBOX_SECRET_KEY=change-this-mailbox-secret-key-min-32-chars SEED_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@veridia.local SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD=ChangeMe123! SEED_ANALYST_EMAIL=analyst@veridia.local SEED_ANALYST_PASSWORD=ChangeMe123! SEED_VIEWER_EMAIL=viewer@veridia.local SEED_VIEWER_PASSWORD=ChangeMe123! npm --prefix api run prisma:migrate && cross-env DATABASE_URL=postgresql://veridia:veridia@127.0.0.1:5432/initiare_erp?schema=public JWT_SECRET=change-this-jwt-secret-before-production-123456 ACTIVE_ACTIONS_HMAC_SECRET=change-this-active-actions-secret-min-32 MAILBOX_SECRET_KEY=change-this-mailbox-secret-key-min-32-chars SEED_ADMIN_EMAIL=admin@veridia.local SEED_ADMIN_PASSWORD=ChangeMe123! SEED_ANALYST_EMAIL=analyst@veridia.local SEED_ANALYST_PASSWORD=ChangeMe123! SEED_VIEWER_EMAIL=viewer@veridia.local SEED_VIEWER_PASSWORD=ChangeMe123! SEED_RESET=true npm --prefix api run prisma:seed:demo
scripts.test:e2e:live:db:prepare: npm run test:e2e:live:db:up && npm run test:db:prepare
scripts.test:e2e:live:api: cross-env PORT=4010 APP_ORIGIN=http://127.0.0.1:8081 DATABASE_URL=postgresql://veridia:veridia@127.0.0.1:5432/initiare_erp?schema=public JWT_SECRET=change-this-jwt-secret-before-production-123456 ACTIVE_ACTIONS_HMAC_SECRET=change-this-active-actions-secret-min-32 MAILBOX_SECRET_KEY=change-this-mailbox-secret-key-min-32-chars SEED_COMPANY_DOMAIN=localhost:8081 npm --prefix api run test:serve
scripts.test:e2e:live: npm run test:e2e:live:db:prepare && playwright test --config playwright.live.config.ts
scripts.test:all: npm run test:unit && npm run test:api && npm run test:e2e
